nasb.text: Under their wings on their four sides were human hands. As for the faces and wings of the four of them,

esv.text: Under their wings on their four sides they had human hands. And the four had their faces and their wings thus:

cnv.text: 在牠們四邊的翅膀下都有人的手。牠們四個活物的臉孔和翅膀是這樣的：

ccb.text: 四面的翅膀下都有人的手，四个活物都有脸和翅膀，
